name: k6 Cloud
description: k6 Cloud — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Load Testing Platform.

seo.title: k6 Cloud Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete k6 Cloud analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: k6 Cloud is a Test Automation / Device Cloud tool.
pros: Parallel test execution across real devices reduces flakiness
cons: Device cloud minutes add up for large test suites
review.best_for: Mobile and web teams needing cross-device coverage
review.not_for: Projects with minimal UI or no regression testing needs
